The '''Tandell system''', also known as the '''Wor Tandell system''', was the home [[Star system/Legends|system]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Wor Tandell/Legends|Wor Tandell]]. It was located in the [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]].

==History==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Tay Vanis]] had inserted himself as an aide to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Cuvir]] in the governor's mansion on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Wor Tandell/Legends|Wor Tandell]], where he was collecting data on [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] movements in the Tandell [[Star system/Legends|system]] sometime early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>
